ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, completed) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_lines" (
  "order_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order line */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the line item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the line item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "line_total" TEXT /* Total amount for the line item */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the line item */,
  "tax" TEXT /* Tax amount for the line item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_lines_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_lines_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_sub_lines" (
  "order_sub_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order sub-line */,
  "order_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order line the sub-line belongs to */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch associated with the sub-line */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the sub-line */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the batch */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_sub_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_sub_lines_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_sub_lines_order_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_line_id") REFERENCES order_lines ("order_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the batch */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date the batch was produced */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the batch */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the batch */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the batch (e.g., in-stock, out-of-stock) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the batch is stored */,
  "quality_control_status" TEXT /* Quality control status of the batch (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the product (e.g., kg, units) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimension of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the supplier (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_products" (
  "supplier_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier-product relationship */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "supply_rate" TEXT /* Rate at which the supplier supplies the product */,
  "last_supply_date" TEXT /* Date of the last supply */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the supplier to deliver the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_checks" (
  "quality_check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the quality check was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the quality check */,
  "checked_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_checks_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, operator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory movement */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product moved */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the movement occurred */,
  "movement_date" TEXT /* Date of the movement */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product moved */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of movement (e.g., in, out) */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch moved */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the movement (e.g., sales, transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_movements_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_movements_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_movements_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control standard */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the standard applies to */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard */,
  "standard_value" TEXT /* Value of the standard */,
  "standard_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_standards_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_test_results_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the return belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product returned */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the shipment belongs to */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
